conservative.name: Rapid Fire
conservative.requirements: Bow or repeating ranged weapon equipped, disengaged from target

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage

boon.description: Perform a free manoeuvre after this action is completed

bane.description: 1 opponent within close range of you who is not engaged with an opponent may engage you

challenge.description: Special: If you hit with this attack, you may immediately perform this action again, choosing either the same target or a new target in the same engagement as the first, and adding to your dice pool. You may do this only once and only if you still meet the requirements for the attack

reckless.name: Rapid Fire
reckless.requirements: Bow or repeating ranged weapon equipped, disengaged from target

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage

boon.description: Perform a free manoeuvre after this action is completed

bane.description: 1 opponent within close range who is not engaged with you may engage you

challenge.description: Special: If you hit with this attack, you may immediately perform this action again, choosing either the same target or a new target in the same engagement as the first, and adding to your dice pool. You may fire up to 3 times, as long as you still meet the requirements for the attack and as long as you continue to hit, but you must add another to your dice pool each time you perform this action
